title: More Soups Mod
description: New vanilla-style useful soups with many new effects like lucky block, and country-themed food (from stardew valley, horror mods, terraria and popular brands)
body:
# New Soups to Minecraft 1.20+ # 
**This mod include many new Food Eatable Soups with custom effect from video games and country-themed: tnt, brick, borsch, buldak, doshirak, lucky block soup, chorus, chicken, rice & etc**

---
